name: GPU-T
desc: A GPU-Z inspired diagnostic tool for Linux. GPU-T provides detailed hardware specs, real-time sensors, and advanced diagnostics for AMD and NVIDIA GPUs (Intel …
descFull: A GPU-Z inspired diagnostic tool for Linux. GPU-T provides detailed hardware specs, real-time sensors, and advanced diagnostics for AMD and NVIDIA GPUs (Intel support planned). Built with .NET & Avalonia UI. Features hardware lookup, sensor logging, and ReBAR detection. Shipped as a self-contained AppImage. No root required.
